title: AnvilCraft: Patchouli
body:
* 为铁砧工艺添加帕秋莉手册的支持
  * 在安装帕秋莉手册与本模组时，可以通过铁砧工艺的指南书打开本模组提供的指南手册
* Add Patchouli Guide support to AnvilCraft
  * When installing Patchouli and this mod, you can open the guidebook provided by this mod through the guidebook of the AnvilCraft.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I1Hcdn22/images/418b40b4d74516a64fd05c42ce9175f6f204a831.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I1Hcdn22/images/76c6b546a895356233eb8c990822223204eda214.png)
